title: OTP Screen - Verify OTP auto-fill functionality (if supported)
description: Tests if the app can automatically read the OTP from the SMS and fill it in the input fields.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.
The OS supports SMS reading permissions and it has been granted.

steps.description: 1. After navigating to the OTP screen, wait for the OTP SMS to arrive.
2. Observe if a prompt appears to auto-fill the code.
4. Verify the OTP fields are populated with the correct code and verification proceeds.

expected_result: The OTP is automatically detected from the SMS and filled into the input fields, leading to successful verification.
